findings.summary: Pagination cursor never advances, so page 2 re-returns page 1
findings.evidence: the query uses `.take(limit)` without ordering by the cursor field before taking, so the same rows come back each call; the cursor is computed but never applied to the filter.

findings.summary: Suggests renaming the variable for clarity
Claims a null-deref on the response object
findings.evidence: the object is constructed two lines above and cannot be null on this path; the model misread the scope.
